text:
total charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for all accommodations (routine hospital room 
and board charges for general care, coronary care, and/or intensive care units) related to a 
beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: ACMDTNS 

LONG NAME: ACMDTNS_TOT_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is the sum of MEDPAR private room charge amounts, MEDPAR semiprivate room charge 
amount, MEDPAR ward charge amount, MEDPAR intensive care charge
